name: doc-to-md
description: Local document-to-Markdown conversion skill with MarkItDown, reusable workflow profiles, optional PDF audit bundles, and optional OCR preprocessing.

interface.shortDescription: Convert trusted local documents to Markdown.
interface.longDescription: Distributes the public doc-to-md skill for Codex. It wraps a pinned local MarkItDown runtime, supports protected -o output writes, reusable standard and textbook/OCR workflow profiles, optional PDF audit bundles, optional OCR preprocessing, and explicit platform and reproducibility boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Use Doc To Md to convert this local file to Markdown.
Run doc-to-md doctor and convert this PDF.
Create a PDF audit bundle for this textbook.
Use the Textbook Audit + OCR Profile for this scanned PDF.
